name: BriefRooms Weekly Market Direction Model
language_note: This file defines the rule-based method used for weekly educational market scenarios in the Investing room. Modify this file to improve the model; do not rewrite past forecasts after results are known.

market_window.entry_capture: Monday 08:00 Europe/Warsaw, captured by GitHub Actions near that time
market_window.planned_exit_capture: Friday evening after the weekly close, captured by GitHub Actions near 22:00 Europe/Warsaw
market_window.intraweek_review: Tuesday to Friday, several scheduled reviews during the week; if the model rules end a scenario early, the timestamp, price and reason are saved immediately.

trend.description: EMA20 vs EMA50 and last close vs EMA20. Positive when the market is above its short and medium trend.

momentum.description: 5-day and 20-day price change. Positive when recent momentum confirms the trend.

volatility_regime.description: Higher volatility reduces confidence and can shift the decision toward neutral.

macro_bias.description: Manual macro override. Default 0. Can be adjusted before Sunday forecast generation.

event_risk.description: Manual event-risk override. Default 0. Negative value reduces directional conviction before major risk events.

intraweek_scenario_review.rules_note: These rules end a model scenario early for the educational log only; they are not investment advice or an order instruction.
